name: GONZO VR
short_description: A VR stealth game about a ridiculous conspiracy involving cults, nukes, aliens & more. Snap pictures, use slingshots and realistic guns, sneak, distract enemies, and explore a variety of environments as you seek out the mysterious mastermind behind it all.
detailed_description:
Assume the role of an independent investigative journalist as you follow the threads of an increasingly ridiculous conspiracy involving cults, aliens, nukes, moon bases and a mysterious and evasive mastermind whose motives are unclear.

GONZO VR is a virtual-reality stealth game modeled on classics of the "tactical espionage" genre, lovingly developed by two brothers. Explore a variety of environments in a PS2-inspired artstyle with your two primary tools: a camera and a slingshot -- as well as a variety of weapons and attachments you can find along the way. As you sneak (or brazenly shoot) through 13 levels including a nightclub, a Titan II missile silo, Area 51, etc., take a moment to enjoy the original soundtrack by electronic artist Stress Actual.

The game features a variety of features designed to take full advantage of standing/room-scale VR and Vive/Oculus/Index controllers, including:

  • Realistic Gun Mechanics - eject/load magazines, pull back the slide, aim with two hands and shoot! Use laser sights and silencers to your advantage!
  • Robust AI - sneak, distract, knock-out or kill guards with realistic vision and hearing. Drag and hide bodies, press heads against retinal scanners, and avoid triggering an alarm!
  • Hide, Hide, Hide! - hide behind corners, under desks, in vents or lockers to avoid detection by enemies. Avoid or disable security cameras!
  • Listen for the Click - crack safes with dials or passcodes found on usable computers to find weapons and ammo to keep you going!
